This shoes has good cushioning. You can immediately feel the cushion when you start walking/running. Good for running or even daily commutes. Price is very affordable.
very good quality and reasonably priced..

I’ve been using these shoes for walking and jogging, and they perform really well. They are comfortable and provide good support for movement.

However, a word of caution regarding the fit: I highly recommend wearing high socks with these. I wore ankle socks during one of my runs, and the back of the shoe rubbed against my skin, causing blisters on my heels. As long as you wear longer socks to protect your ankles, these are excellent shoes for daily exercise!
The shoes was very comfy for running and walking as well. We had a great choice

First time with Decathlon's own brand. For the price, excellent value for this mid-range runner. Comfortable and fits well. Does not feel especially smooth on the heel, and although bumps are absorbed, I found the cushioning to be quite firm.
Am enjoying running in these at distances up to 10KM and great for the price.

Race course road running

Earlier I used random shoes, and during long runs I used to feel pain from knee to toe. My legs also used to feel burning due to heat buildup.
After using these shoes, I noticed a clear improvement. The cushioning is good and absorbs impact well, so knee-to-toe pain is significantly reduced even during longer runs. The shoe also feels more breathable compared to my previous ones, so the burning sensation in legs is less.
However, it is not perfect—after very long runs, slight discomfort can still happen. But overall, for this price range, it is a good and practical option for regular running.

The product was bought in July 2025, by Jan 2026 it has degraded to a level that it is unusable. I believe this quality of product should not cost more than Rs 900 which are sold on the roadside. However I paid more than Rs 2400.
The left shoe has degraged from inside and the material has given away. I got scratch mark near my heal due to this.
The right shoe inner material is in the process of the same.
Note- this product is only used for walking and jogging. That's all.
